title: hedera helix var. roegneriana
intro: Hedera helix var. roegneriana, also known as the Chinese ivy, is a variety of the common ivy plant native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedera helix var. roegneriana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
